title: PatternRelationship
description: Schema for PatternRelationship entities representing directed relationships between construction patterns, capturing adjacencies, conflicts, and dependencies.

id.description: Unique identifier for the pattern relationship, following the SOUND-CONSTR-REL naming convention.

description.description: Detailed description of the relationship, explaining the nature of the connection between the source and target patterns.

schema_version.description: Version of this JSON schema definition used to validate the entity.

pattern_language_version.description: Version of the Construction Pattern Language specification this entity conforms to.

entity_revision.description: Monotonically increasing revision number for this entity, incremented on each update.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when this entity was originally created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when this entity was last modified.

relationship_type.description: The classification of this relationship: 'adjacency' indicates patterns that physically or logically neighbor each other, 'conflict' indicates patterns that are incompatible, and 'dependency' indicates that the source pattern requires the target pattern.

source_id.description: The identifier of the originating pattern in this directed relationship.

target_id.description: The identifier of the destination pattern in this directed relationship.

conditions.description: Optional list of conditions or circumstances under which this relationship applies.

items.description: A condition statement describing when or why this relationship is active.

notes.description: Free-form notes or additional context about this pattern relationship.
